query: low resolution pixelated mosaic blocky digital image
message: sub:digital_artifacts/pixelation — anti_aesthetic — pixel mosaic, blocky low-res, color-cell grids

response.objective_caption: A digital collage composed of irregular polygonal shards arranged in a fractured, tessellated mosaic. Several fragments contain cropped photographs of cloudy skies in varying shades of blue and gray, while neighboring shards are filled with flat solid colors including navy, cyan, white, and black. At the center, a circle divided vertically into two halves displays dense, fine linear striations, with the left side tinted blue and the right side rendered in black and white. Additional angular pieces show similar granular or lined surface patterns. Sharp geometric boundaries separate each segment, creating a layered, angular composition.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal, abstract digital collage composed of irregular polygonal shards arranged in a fractured mosaic that abandons representational clarity. Several fragments contain cropped photographs of cloudy skies in varying shades of blue and gray, juxtaposed with shards of flat solid color and areas covered in dense, fine linear textures. At the center, a vertically split circle filled with striated patterns serves as a focal point amid the angular fragmentation. The dreamlike juxtaposition of realistic sky photography with impossible geometric abstraction, conflicting spatial planes, and emphasis on formal texture and shape over recognizable subject matter creates an irrational, subconscious visual experience.
